response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
total area = 20 × 15 = 300 m²  
area for dining tables = 300 − πr²  
equation: 300 − πr² = 2πr²  
300 = 3πr²  
r² = 100/π  
r = √(100/π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. radius of fountain = r/3 ≈ 1.88 m  
surface area = 2πrh + πr²  
= 2π(1.88)(1.5) + π(1.88)²  
≈ 17.8 + 10.9 ≈ 28.7 m²  
cost = 28.7 × 50 = 1435  

r  
1435
